business.title: Axis Bank raises $800 million through dual bond sale
business.summary: Axis Bank successfully raised $800 million through a dual tranche dollar bond, tapping into the Reserve Bank of India's concessional swap facility. The bank secured $500 million via an Additional Tier 1 perpetual issue and $300 million from a five-year senior bond. Both issuances attracted significant investor interest, closing within initial price guidance and highlighting the bank's strong position in international markets.

business.title: Promoter Twin Star sells Vedanta shares worth Rs 1,896 crore in block deal
business.summary: Twin Star Holdings, a promoter entity of Vedanta, sold 6.51 crore shares worth nearly Rs 1,896 crore through a block deal on Tuesday. The transaction comes amid Vedanta's ongoing restructuring efforts following the listing of its demerged businesses and continued focus on debt reduction and value unlocking.

business.title: US Stocks Today | Chip stocks plunge, but bargain-hunters stem losses in other tech names
business.summary: US chip stocks experienced a significant tumble, impacting the broader market and wiping out billions in value. While tech giants like Nvidia and Tesla saw declines, bargain hunters emerged, offering some support. This selloff, attributed to concentrated trading and shifting sentiment rather than AI fundamentals, highlights the volatility in the tech sector, especially for newly public companies like SpaceX.

business.title: US Stocks | AI chip slump extends on Wall St as SanDisk sinks 12%, Micron drops 9% and AMD falls 5%
business.summary: Wall Street witnessed a significant downturn in semiconductor stocks Tuesday, impacting major AI beneficiaries. Memory chipmakers like SanDisk and Micron saw substantial drops as investors re-evaluated high valuations amid escalating AI spending. This correction, also affecting broader tech, signals growing caution about the speed of returns from massive AI investments, prompting some to secure profits.
